{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Hidden Sword
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Hidden Sword]] technique has principles in common with the [[Winter Sage]]'s [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
